input.prompt:
I'm adding dark mode to my .NET MAUI Android app. I created ResourceDictionary
themes and used StaticResource to bind colors in my XAML pages. When I
switch themes at runtime nothing changes — the colors stay the same. Also,
when the user toggles dark mode in Android settings my app seems to restart
completely. What am I doing wrong?

input.initialPrompt:
I'm adding dark mode to my .NET MAUI Android app. I created ResourceDictionary
themes and used StaticResource to bind colors in my XAML pages. When I
switch themes at runtime nothing changes — the colors stay the same. Also,
when the user toggles dark mode in Android settings my app seems to restart
completely. What am I doing wrong?

data.content:
Two separate issues:

## 1. `StaticResource` won't update at runtime

`StaticResource` resolves **once** at XAML load time. Use **`DynamicResource`** instead — it re-evaluates when the underlying dictionary changes:

```xml
<!-- ❌ Won't update -->
<Label TextColor="{StaticResource PrimaryTextColor}" />

<!-- ✅ Updates when you swap dictionaries -->
<Label TextColor="{DynamicResource PrimaryTextColor}" />
```

Then swap themes by replacing the merged dictionary at runtime:

```csharp
var mergedDicts = Application.Current.Resources.MergedDictionaries;
mergedDicts.Clear();
mergedDicts.Add(new DarkTheme()); // or LightTheme
```

## 2. Activity restart on Android config change

Android destroys and recreates the Activity when `uiMode` changes. In your `Platforms/Android/MainActivity.cs`, add `UiMode` to `ConfigurationChanges`:

```csharp
[Activity(
    Theme = "@style/Maui.SplashTheme",
    ConfigurationChanges = ConfigChanges.ScreenSize
        | ConfigChanges.Orientation
        | ConfigChanges.UiMode  // ← prevents restart on dark mode toggle
        | ConfigChanges.ScreenLayout
        | ConfigChanges.SmallestScreenSize)]
public class MainActivity : MauiAppCompatActivity { }
```

Then optionally detect the system change and react:

```csharp
public override void OnConfigurationChanged(Configuration newConfig)
{
    base.OnConfigurationChanged(newConfig);

    var isDark = (newConfig.UiMode & UiMode.NightMask) == UiMode.NightYes;
    // swap your DynamicResource theme here
}
```

**TL;DR:** `StaticResource` → `DynamicResource` for runtime changes; add `ConfigChanges.UiMode` to prevent the activity restart.
data.reasoningText:
The user is asking about two issues with dark mode in their .NET MAUI Android app:

1. **StaticResource doesn't update at runtime** — This is a common mistake. `StaticResource` is resolved once at load time and never updates. They need to use `DynamicResource` instead, which listens for changes to the resource dictionary.

2. **App restarts when Android dark mode setting changes** — By default, Android recreates the Activity when a configuration change like `uiMode` occurs. In .NET MAUI, you need to handle this by adding `ConfigChanges` to the `Activity` attribute to prevent the activity from being destroyed and recreated.


I should give them the specific fixes they need to implement.
